en: Eat at a restaurant, not wear a mask, sleep over at Ellen's. All right. All right. All right. All right.
ko: 식당에서 먹고, 마스크 안 쓰고, 엘렌 집에서 자고. 좋아. 좋아. 좋아. 좋아.

en: All right. All right. All right. All right. All right. All right. Nell, that got in? No. No. OK.
ko: 좋아. 좋아. 좋아. 좋아. 좋아. 좋아. 넬, 그거 들어갔어? 아니. 아니. 알겠어.

en: Sleep over at my house is never going to get in. Never going to be there.
ko: 내 집에서 자는 건 절대 안 될 거야. 절대 거기 없을 거야.

en: Ellen, name three things you like about Andy.
ko: 엘렌, 앤디에 대해 좋아하는 세 가지 말해봐.

en: Oh, I like that he's sweet.
And that he's really, that was hard. That was hard to find something.
It's the things that I don't like that make me love him.
ko: 내가 싫어하는 것들이 그를 사랑하게 만들어.

en: It's like your impatience that you don't pay attention.
ko: 네가 참을성이 없고 주의를 기울이지 않는 것처럼.

en: All right, let's get to the next one.
Andy, name three nicknames Ellen has for you.
ko: 앤디, 엘렌이 너에게 붙인 별명 세 가지 말해봐.

en: Average, little baby man, and that's it.
ko: 평균, 아기 남자, 그리고 그게 다야.

en: She calls me little, she says I'm the combination
ko: 그녀는 나를 아기와 노인의 조합이라고 해.

en: of a baby and an old man. You are. Yeah, a little bit.
Very immature, and yet you're an old man.
